title: Jukebox Particles
description: Add music particles to jukeboxes similar to Bedrock.
body: # Jukebox Particles ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.19%20|%201.18.2-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Client-%23313e51?style=for-the-badge) --- Add music particles to jukeboxes similar to Bedrock. Due to a limitation in the Java edition of Minecraft, the particles will continue to appear even after the actual sound file finishes playing, similar to how parrots will continue to dance. --- ## Maintenance mode Since Mojang has added this functionality to jukeboxes in 1.19.4, I will no longer be updating this mod to newer versions
